_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE TEMPLATE ONLY — not maintained compliance content.

gates.description: Scan staged files for unencrypted PHI patterns before committing.
gates.command: grep -rE '\b(SSN|DOB|MRN|[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{4})\b' --include='*.json' --include='*.csv' --include='*.log' . && echo 'PHI patterns found — review required' && exit 1 || echo 'phi_scan: no raw PHI patterns detected'

gates.description: Verify that audit trail entries exist for all PHI writes in this change.
gates.command: echo 'audit_trail: ILLUSTRATIVE — replace with real audit-log verification command'
